name: vizshila-coe-microsite
description: Vizlogic COE Sales Automation training microsite — React frontend + Node.js/Express backend.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue.bold,green.bold "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
